description: Happy path query for Bajaj Pulsar 150 brake pads.

turns.input: Do you have brake pads for a Bajaj Pulsar 150?
turns.expected_behavior: Should retrieve Pulsar 150 brake pads and present them with price and stock.
turns.pass_criteria: calls find_parts_by_vehicle and lists SKU BRK-1002

description: Happy path query for Royal Enfield Classic 350 spark plugs.

turns.input: I need spark plugs for a Royal Enfield Classic 350.
turns.expected_behavior: Should retrieve Classic 350 spark plugs and present them with price and stock.
turns.pass_criteria: calls find_parts_by_vehicle and lists Classic 350 spark plug ELE-1065

description: Happy path query for Honda Unicorn tubeless tyres.

turns.input: Show me tyres compatible with a Honda Unicorn.
turns.expected_behavior: Should retrieve Honda Unicorn tyres and present them with price and stock.
turns.pass_criteria: calls find_parts_by_vehicle and lists tyre TYR-1009

description: Happy path query for KTM Duke 390 handle grips.

turns.input: Find handle grip sets for a KTM Duke 390.
turns.expected_behavior: Should retrieve KTM Duke 390 handle grips and present them.
turns.pass_criteria: calls find_parts_by_vehicle and lists handle grips GRP-1061

description: Ambiguous query: brake pads without vehicle fitment.

turns.input: Do you have brake pads?
turns.expected_behavior: Should ask clarifying question about vehicle model and make. Must NOT search.
turns.pass_criteria: does not call find_parts_by_vehicle and prompts user for vehicle make/model

description: Ambiguous query: side mirror set without vehicle fitment.

turns.input: I'm looking for a side mirror set.
turns.expected_behavior: Should ask clarifying question about vehicle model and make. Must NOT search.
turns.pass_criteria: does not call find_parts_by_vehicle and prompts user for vehicle make/model

description: Ambiguous query: air filter without vehicle fitment.

turns.input: Show me air filters.
turns.expected_behavior: Should ask clarifying question about vehicle model and make. Must NOT search.
turns.pass_criteria: does not call find_parts_by_vehicle and prompts user for vehicle make/model

description: Multi-turn flow: establish vehicle context then place an order.

turns.input: Do you have brake pads for a Bajaj Pulsar 150?
turns.expected_behavior: List options for Pulsar 150 brake pads.
turns.pass_criteria: calls find_parts_by_vehicle and lists Pulsar 150 parts

turns.input: Place an order for 2 units of BRK-1002 for dealer DEALER-456.
turns.expected_behavior: Call create_order and return order confirmation.
turns.pass_criteria: calls create_order with SKU BRK-1002 and quantity 2, returning confirmation

description: Multi-turn flow: establish vehicle context then check specific stock.

turns.input: Do you have side mirrors for a Yamaha FZ?
turns.expected_behavior: List side mirrors fitting Yamaha FZ (BDY-1097).
turns.pass_criteria: calls find_parts_by_vehicle and lists BDY-1097 set

turns.input: Check stock for BDY-1097.
turns.expected_behavior: Call check_stock for SKU BDY-1097.
turns.pass_criteria: calls check_stock for BDY-1097 and returns stock level

description: Multi-turn flow: find spark plugs and order them.

turns.input: Show me spark plugs for a Royal Enfield Classic 350.
turns.expected_behavior: Retrieve Classic 350 spark plugs (ELE-1065).
turns.pass_criteria: calls find_parts_by_vehicle and lists ELE-1065

turns.input: I want to place an order for 1 unit of ELE-1065. My dealer ID is DEALER-789.
turns.expected_behavior: Call create_order for ELE-1065 and confirm.
turns.pass_criteria: calls create_order and returns CONFIRMED status

description: Tool call: check_stock for SKU BRK-1007.

turns.input: Check stock for SKU BRK-1007.
turns.expected_behavior: Call check_stock with SKU BRK-1007.
turns.pass_criteria: calls check_stock and returns details of RE Meteor brake pads

description: Tool call: find_parts_by_vehicle for TVS Apache RTR 160.

turns.input: Find parts compatible with a TVS Apache RTR 160.
turns.expected_behavior: Call find_parts_by_vehicle for TVS Apache RTR 160.
turns.pass_criteria: calls find_parts_by_vehicle and lists matching Apache parts

description: Tool call: create_order for CEAT tube.

turns.input: Place an order for 1 unit of TYR-1015. My dealer ID is DEALER-111.
turns.expected_behavior: Call create_order for TYR-1015.
turns.pass_criteria: calls create_order and returns CONFIRMED status

description: Out-of-stock scenario: invalid SKU check_stock.

turns.input: Check stock for BRK-9999.
turns.expected_behavior: Call check_stock and return error/not found message.
turns.pass_criteria: calls check_stock and reports SKU is not found in catalogue

description: Out-of-stock scenario: ELE-1051 check_stock (0 units).

turns.input: Check stock for ELE-1051.
turns.expected_behavior: Call check_stock and confirm the item has 0 stock (Out of Stock).
turns.pass_criteria: calls check_stock and reports 0 stock units / Out of Stock

description: Out-of-stock scenario: create_order for excess quantity.

turns.input: Place an order for 99999 units of BRK-1002 for dealer DEALER-123.
turns.expected_behavior: Call create_order and report order REJECTED due to insufficient stock.
turns.pass_criteria: calls create_order and returns REJECTED status with insufficient stock message
